special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls one of two Blaster Fighter starships in horizontally scrolling shooter. No jump/gravity mechanics documented as game is shmup genre.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Switching
special_mechanics.description: Seven equippable weapons that modify ship firepower and movement abilities: Striker (vertical Options), Reverse Shot (diagonal rear fire), Six Way Shot (semi-automatic), Homing Shot (tracking), Red Rockets, Green Homing Missiles, Border (collision shield)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Air Buster is a horizontally scrolling shmup with no documented player character gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel system data. Movement parameters are ship-based rather than platformer-based. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay, development, and reception information with no technical physics specifications.
